description: Gate 2 approval: marks script as approved, setting topic status to 'approved' which signals readiness for Phase 4 production pipeline. Synchronous — returns immediately with result.

sync_steps.name: Log approval
sync_steps.action: POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { project_id, topic_id, stage: 'script_review', action: 'approved', details: { quality_score: topic.script_quality_score, force_passed: topic.script_force_passed } }

error_handling.on_supabase_write_error: Return { success: false, error: 'Failed to update topic status' } with HTTP 500
error_handling.on_topic_not_found: Return { success: false, error: 'Topic not found' } with HTTP 404

notes: After approval, status='approved' signals Phase 4 production pipeline can begin.
Phase 3 does NOT wire production triggers — it only sets the status.
The dashboard reads script_review_status to show approval badges on Topic Review cards.
